data.current_role_summary: Early-career technical professional currently serving as a Programmer Analyst Trainee at Cognizant.
role_summary_bullets: Core Identity & Mission: Entry-level software engineering professional focused on professional development and enterprise technology delivery.
Domain Mastery: Technical competency in full-stack web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and backend logic (Python, Java, Flask, SQL).
Quantifiable Impact: Applied machine learning techniques including Random Forest for predictive agricultural analytics and computer vision via OpenCV/Mediapipe.
Strategic Scope: Development of interactive, gesture-based software tools for real-time annotation and visual manipulation.
Leadership Philosophy: Primarily focused on individual contributor excellence and collaborative project development via GitHub.
Current Momentum: Transitioned from academic background in computer science to a corporate trainee program at a major global IT services firm.

career_timeline.title: Programmer Analyst Trainee
career_timeline.one_line_impact: Participating in structured professional development and IT services delivery as a trainee.

data.data_confidence_rationale: The data is derived directly from the provided LinkedIn profile, which contains clear start dates and specific project details for the subject's academic and professional timeline.
